data.body: Starting execution of epic effete-sanctified-sambar (1d96-6bc8-9749-45b8) as a stacked Gerrit change. Worktree .claude/worktrees/janitor-cleanup-0707 branch worktree-janitor-cleanup-0707 off origin/main 67372d018. Plan: epic plan-review -> transition epic in_progress -> per-child (review-plan -> claim -> implement -> verify-completion -> close) each a stacked commit -> push stack to gerrit refs/for/main -> close epic -> land stack together.
